news.headline: WHO declares emergency as Ebola outbreak kills more than 80 in DR Congo
news.summary: The World Health Organization declared an international health emergency on Sunday over an outbreak of an Ebola strain in the Democratic Republic of Congo that has killed more than 80 and for which there is no vaccine.
